====''[[Pokémon the Series: Diamond and Pearl]]''====
Saturn debuted in a cameo at the end of ''[[DP036|A Secret Sphere of Influence!]]''. He, along with some {{tc|Team Galactic Grunt}}s, commented that [[Jessie]], [[James]], and {{MTR}} did a lousy job at stealing the [[Adamant Orb]] for them, and framing [[Nando]] for the crime.

Saturn's first speaking appearance was in ''[[DP060|Journey to the Unown!]]'', along with his {{p|Bronzor}}. He managed to steal a cube that was under the guard of the {{p|Unown}} of the [[Solaceon Ruins]] and brought it with him back to the [[Team Galactic HQ]].

Later, in ''[[DP069|Enter Galactic!]]'', Saturn exposed the cube to the meteorites in [[Veilstone City]], transforming it into the [[Spear Key]]. He and a few Team Galactic Grunts went to go steal the meteorites, but ended up meeting {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} for the first time. He also battled {{an|Brock}} and his {{TP|Brock|Croagunk}} with his own {{TP|Saturn|Toxicroak}}, which ended after Team Galactic made a tactical retreat.

In ''[[DP096|Losing Its Lustrous]]'' and ''[[DP097|Double Team Turnover!]]'', Saturn stole the [[Adamant Orb]] while it was being transported to the [[Celestic Town Historical Research Center]] from Eterna City. He also aided in stealing the [[Lustrous Orb]] from the [[Celestic Town Historical Research Center]] but was admonished by Cyrus after the completion of the mission for displaying ineptitude.

In ''[[DP111|Saving the World From Ruins!]]'', following the failure of [[Mars]]'s [[Iron Island]] mission, [[Cyrus]] placed Saturn in charge of the [[Spear Pillar]]'s excavation from [[Mount Coronet]]. He worked with [[Charon]] to locate ruins on Mount Coronet in ''[[DP136|Gateway to Ruin!]]''. Team Galactic located some ruins, though not the ones they wanted. Saturn and the others then fled following the arrival of [[Looker]] and Ash's group. Later, Saturn returned to Mount Coronet and discovered the Spear Pillar ruins in ''[[DP150|Unlocking the Red Chain of Events!]]'', allowing him to fast-track Team Galactic's scheme.

In ''[[DP151|The Needs of the Three!]]'', Saturn kept {{Gary}} at bay while [[J|Pokémon Hunter J]] successfully captured the three {{an|lake guardians}} at [[Lake Valor]]. He later returned to [[Team Galactic HQ]].

In ''[[DP152|The Battle Finale of Legend!]]'', Saturn's Toxicroak was defeated by Brock's Croagunk. After Cyrus passed through the [[dimension]]al portal created by {{p|Dialga}} and {{p|Palkia}} he realized that Cyrus had just been using him and the other {{tc|Commander}}s to reach his own goals and cared little for those who served him. When Mars hysterically attempted to follow their Leader, Saturn grabbed her arm to block her from doing so, shaking his head solemnly at his fellow Commander. Afterwards he was arrested along with Mars and [[Jupiter]] by [[Looker]] and stated that Team Galactic was finished.

He appeared briefly in ''[[DP191|Memories are Made of Bliss!]]'' in {{TRT}}'s fantasy with all the other members of Team Galactic.
